{{Quote|Need a ''really'' big gun?|''Aggressor''-class [[Destroyer/Legends|destroyer]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]]|audio=BiggerGun.flac|<ref name="EAW:FOC" />}}
The '''''Aggressor''-class destroyer''' was one of several different [[Warship/Legends|warship]] classes utilized by [[Tyber Zann]]'s [[Zann Consortium/Legends|faction]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|There'll be nothing left but smoke…|An ''Aggressor''-class captain|<ref name="EAW:FOC" />}}
[[File:Krayt_destroyer_shot.jpg|thumb|left|200px|An ''Aggressor''-class [[Destroyer/Legends|destroyer]] firing one of its main guns.]]
Ships of the class were comparable in terms of size to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] and were armed with two powerful fire-linked guns fixed to the forward hull which fired a large [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion]] pulse followed by an enormous, spiraling [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] shot. The ion shot disabled the shields so the plasma shot could do maximum damage. They were also armed with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries in their wings. However, once the main cannons were destroyed, the ship is nearly helpless against conventional capital ships with only one turbolaser battery on each side.<ref name="EAW:FOC" />

In addition, they could bombard enemy ground positions from orbit with their devastating weaponry. It was a very strong—and very expensive—warship.<ref name="EAW:FOC" />

Although the class had heavy armor, they were cumbersome in battle and needed protection from quicker [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] and their [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. These ships were known to utilize their self destruct mechanism when it was required to damage the enemy in a losing battle.<ref name="EAW:FOC" />

==History==
{{Quote|An interesting design.|[[Urai Fen]]|<ref name="EAW:FOC" />}}
[[File:Underworld_capital.jpg|thumb|left|The ''[[Merciless]]'' moves out to engage in battle.]]
The ship that would become the ''Aggressor''-class was designed by the Galactic Empire at some point prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The plans were kept onboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], where they were being studied, along with other new ship designs. Upon the station's destruction, the plans were safely stored in a [[data pod]], which was located by Tyber Zann after the battle.<ref name="EAW:FOC" />

Zann [[Space Battle at Yavin 4|stole]] the prototype vessel from the Empire<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> and modified the plans to create his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Merciless (Aggressor-class)|''Merciless'']]. Other ''Aggressor''-class destroyers built after this were based on these modified plans. They soon became part of Consortium navies and proved effective against other capital ships but vulnerable to fighters.<ref name="EAW:FOC" />
During their service to the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Consortium]], they also became well known as "Underworld Capital Ships".<ref name="EAW:FOC" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Aggressor3.jpg|thumb|right|175px|The [[Merciless (Aggressor-class)|''Merciless'']] engaging an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]].]]

The ''Aggressor''-class destroyer was originally named the "[[Krayt dragon/Legends|''Krayt'']]-class destroyer". Game data files still use this name for internal references. The [[2009]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' incorrectly titles the ship the ''Aggressor''-class "Star Destroyer".
